description_long: This is a three-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The exterior is clad in white brick, featuring symmetrical window arrangements on the front and rear, with three windows per story on the main facade. The front entryway is accessible via a small porch with metal railings and a short set of steps, and there is a neatly maintained hedge along the base of the building. The side walls are mostly unadorned, with one side featuring a walkway and railing, while the other is plain. The roof is flat and open, suggesting possible rooftop access or use.
description: A modern, three-story white brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a small front porch with railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, three rows of windows, porch with railings, and a hedge along the base.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain brick wall, visible walkway and railing extending from the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical windows and minimal detailing, no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick wall and the continuation of the porch walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small porch, metal railings, and a short set of steps, flanked by a hedge.
